title: Murmuration
description: A starling murmuration at dusk — thousands of birds flocking by three simple rules (separation, alignment, cohesion) fold into shifting ribbons and breathing density clouds against a fading sky. A wheeling predator (or your pointer) scatters the flock into a startle-wave that ripples out and re-forms. Flock size, the flocking weights, predator fear, speed and sky are live and mappable.
